name: SEEK (DOORS 👁) [DAM]
description:
Seek is canonically non-binary, but lets just call this genderbent. Character is from Roblox’s hit game, DOORS. Which just had its new update. Floor 2, or The Mines. Art is by me, and inspired by Devvzers.

Yknow, after making this art. I realized Seek only had 3 fingers. Mb ya’ll.

Scenario is just.. Door 200.
